mainfont: "texgyreschola-regular.otf"

mainfont: "TeX Gyre Schola"

KO mainfont: "Century Schoolbook L Roman"

### Fetch Fonts from Windows

- in *Control Panel\\All Control Panel Items\\Fonts* or *C:\\Windows\\Fonts*

- copy to *C:\\\_myHUL\\VOL\\RS\\\_EXT\\myFONTS*

### Install Fonts on Linux

- i.e. inside Docker /WSL

- https://www.google.com/search?q=how+to+install+a+font+on+gnu%2Blinux

- Most Linux distributions store the system-wide fonts in the "/usr/share/fonts" directory.

- for CenturySchL-Roma follow three lines

- mkdir -p \~/.local/share/fonts

- cp \*.otf \~/.local/share/fonts/

- fc-cache -f

### script

sudo mkdir /usr/share/fonts/truetype/arial

cd /home/rstudio/EXT/\_myFONTS/Arial

sudo mv *.ttf /usr/share/fonts/truetype/arial*

*sudo fc-cache -f -v*

*sudo chgrp rstudio arial + sudo chown rstudio arial*

*sudo chown rstudio* .ttf + sudo chgrp rstudio \*.ttf

fc-match arial

### Sources

## Summary Table (by source)

| Source / Foundry | Fonts |
|------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| **Microsoft / Monotype** | Andale Mono, Arial, Arial Black, Comic Sans MS, Courier New, Georgia, Impact, Times New Roman, Trebuchet MS, Verdana, Webdings |
| **Google Fonts** | Lato (all variants), Roboto (all variants), Roboto Condensed (all variants) |
| **URW++ / Ghostscript** | C059, Century Schoolbook L, D050000L, Nimbus Mono PS, Nimbus Roman, Nimbus Sans, Nimbus Sans Narrow, P052, Standard Symbols PS, URW Bookman, URW Gothic, Z003 |
| **TeX Gyre (based on URW)** | Adventor, Bonum, Chorus, Cursor, Heros, Heros Cn, Pagella, Schola, Termes |

All variants are downloadable from Google Fonts:

### **Lato (all variants)**

<https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Lato>

### **Roboto (all variants)**

<https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Roboto>

### **Roboto Condensed (all variants)**

`https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Roboto+Condensed` [(fonts.google.com in Bing)](https://www.bing.com/search?q=%22https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.google.com%2Fspecimen%2FRoboto%2BCondensed%22)

### **Ghostscript URW font collection**

<https://ghostscript.com/fonts.html> (Direct download: `https://github.com/ArtifexSoftware/urw-base35-fonts` [(github.com in Bing)](https://www.bing.com/search?q=%22https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FArtifexSoftware%2Furw-base35-fonts%22) )

### **SourceForge: corefonts**

This is the *officially permitted redistribution* of the original Microsoft installers.

🔗 `https://sourceforge.net/projects/corefonts/files/the%20fonts/final/` [**(sourceforge.net in Bing)**](https://www.bing.com/search?q=%22https%3A%2F%2Fsourceforge.net%2Fprojects%2Fcorefonts%2Ffiles%2Fthe%2520fonts%2Ffinal%2F%22)

ttf-mscorefonts-installer

- To [install Microsoft fonts on Ubuntu](https://www.wikihow.com/Install-TrueType-Fonts-on-Ubuntu#Installing-Microsoft-Fonts-on-Ubuntu), use the command "sudo apt install ttf-mscorefonts-installer".

cd \~/.fonts for f in adventor bonum chorus cursor heros heroscn pagella schola termes; do wget <https://www.gust.org.pl/projects/e-foundry/tex-gyre/$f.zip> unzip \$f.zip donels
